steps.title: Attach each cost to its variable
steps.content: $g$ is the number of 10-ride passes, and each costs $13.50$, so that cost is $13.50g$. $t$ is the number of single-ride passes, and each costs $1.75$, so that cost is $1.75t$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: This equation matches the correct answer, D. $1.75g + 13.50t = 90$ reverses the two pass costs.
